title: Screen formation
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''"Screen formation"''' was developed by [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]. It allowed [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] to protect a lightly defended [[Starship/Legends|spaceship]] with a minimum of fighters.

Starfighters would form an intricate "sphere" around the ship. The starfighters would regularly swap position within the screen, forming a weaving pattern that made targeting any one vessel difficult. Screen formation was often used as a distraction before executing a [[Cracken Twist]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Last Command]]'' {{Ab|The Last Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[The Last Command Sourcebook]]''
*<!-- 1996-04-15 -->''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''
